title: limonium tomentellum subsp. hypanicum
intro: Limonium tomentellum subsp. hypanicum, also known as the Hypanicum or Montenegrin sea lavender, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Limonium tomentellum subsp. hypanicum include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea or using them in combination with other herbs in tinctures or ointments.
